roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DFT MOT REL ON OR FILED

/AJW/CH1:SP 4 Y:M:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:156/X:DEFENDANT MAY SERVED THE BALANCE OF THE JAIL TERM THRU ASIAN AMERICAN RECOVERY PROGRAM, AND HE IS TOPARTICIPATE IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT,/X:DNA HAS BEEN COMPLIED,/STATES/RESTV/WS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/987,2/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:10-31-08/CTORD:GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, ITIS HEREBY ORDERED DEFENDANT TO   BE RELEASED FROM COUNTY JAIL CUSTODY TO REPRESENTATIVE OF THE SFSD, FOR TRANSPORTATION TO THE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENTFACILITY ASIAN AMERICAN RECOVERY SERVICE, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT BE RELEASED TO THE STREETS/DISM3/VD:12-12-08/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/BAIL:105,000/SA2:833 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA (150 YARDS)/SAORD/ /CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE ON 06-25-08/DOP/
/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28 FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/987,2/
/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN MICHAL TURSI    /HTA1 1 & 2/X COUNT 3IS CERTIFIED IS SUPERIOR COURT/BAIL:55,000/DEFCUST3/SHERCOM1/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/STWPX/CONTD:FINAL SET OR DISPO/
